payload.answer: Conflict detected: Sara cannot simultaneously be your daughter and niece without additional context. Escalation required for resolution.
citations: Family relationship hierarchy: parent_of > aunt_or_uncle_of (default precedence).
Ambiguity rule: Preserve both statements until clarified.

entity_resolution.reason: Conflicting familial relationships detected. Requires human resolution to determine primary relationship or establish disambiguation (e.g., 'Sara is my daughter by birth and niece by marriage').

details: Conflict escalated to human review due to irreconcilable relationships.
No automatic resolution applied to preserve memory integrity.

repair_options: Clarify: 'Sara is my daughter by birth and niece by marriage to [X].'
Disambiguate: 'Sara (daughter) vs. Sara (niece) are distinct individuals.'
Delete superseded: Retain only the most recent relationship (requires explicit intent).
Merge: 'Sara is my daughter and niece (e.g., half-sibling of spouse).'
